# Adelphos AI

> Adelphos AI ships seven flagship apps and three managed agentic services that take hours per week off MEP engineers — built on the MEP Bridge platform with 191 MCP tools and 163 Revit commands.

## Apps (self-serve)

- [Revit Copilot](https://adelphos.ai/apps/revit-copilot/index.html): An AI engineer that lives inside Revit and runs the model with you.
- [Adelphos Chat](https://adelphos.ai/apps/adelphos-chat/index.html): Your project's brain — without Revit, without a desk.
- [Specbuilder](https://adelphos.ai/apps/specbuilder/index.html): The MEP specification, drafted from your live model in minutes.
- [Report Builder](https://adelphos.ai/apps/report-builder/index.html): Every recurring report — composed, formatted, and traceable to source.
- [Document Controller](https://adelphos.ai/apps/document-controller/index.html): Single source of truth for every drawing, every revision, every transmittal.
- [QA Manager](https://adelphos.ai/apps/qa-manager/index.html): Automated QA across drawings, schedules, specs, the model — and ACC clash issues, in one dashboard.
- [Schedule Builder](https://adelphos.ai/apps/schedule-builder/index.html): Production-ready Revit schedules in minutes — cross-checked against the model and your calcs.
- [CoBie Manager](https://adelphos.ai/apps/cobie-manager/index.html): A live, audit-ready COBie deliverable, populated from the model — never a panic before hand-over again.
- [AutoCAD Copilot](https://adelphos.ai/apps/autocad-copilot/index.html): An AI engineer that lives inside AutoCAD MEP — same agent, same tools, same project memory.
- [Adelphos for Word](https://adelphos.ai/apps/word-add-in/index.html): The Adelphos agent inside Word — drafts, reviews, and finishes documents on your house template.
- [Adelphos for Excel](https://adelphos.ai/apps/excel-add-in/index.html): The Adelphos agent inside Excel — connects calc workbooks to the live Revit model.

## Agentic Services (managed)

- [AI Finances](https://adelphos.ai/agentic-services/finances/index.html): Automated bookkeeping, invoicing and cash-flow forecasting — driven by your live project data.
- [AI Project Management](https://adelphos.ai/agentic-services/project-management/index.html): Programme tracking, risk registers and reporting — the agent keeps the project on rails.
- [AI Document Controller](https://adelphos.ai/agentic-services/document-controller/index.html): Transmittals, registers, revision tracking — the agent runs your document control.
- [Specification Writer](https://adelphos.ai/agentic-services/email-specifications/index.html): Forward a brief, receive a complete MEP specification section.
- [Revit Modelling Agent](https://adelphos.ai/agentic-services/email-revit-modelling/index.html): Email a markup, receive the Revit model update.
- [COBie Generator](https://adelphos.ai/agentic-services/email-cobie/index.html): Forward the model, receive a validated COBie deliverable.
- [Schematic Designer](https://adelphos.ai/agentic-services/email-schematics/index.html): Describe the system, receive a production-ready schematic.

## Documentation

- [Tools (191 MCP tools)](https://adelphos.ai/docs/tools/index.html): Every tool the agent can call.
- [Commands (163 Revit commands)](https://adelphos.ai/docs/commands/index.html): Every Revit command we ship.
- [Demos](https://adelphos.ai/demos/index.html): Every workflow on video.
- [Workflows](https://adelphos.ai/workflows/index.html): End-to-end recipes.
- [Compare](https://adelphos.ai/compare/index.html): Adelphos vs alternatives.
- [Changelog](https://adelphos.ai/changelog/index.html): Release history.
- [Glossary](https://adelphos.ai/glossary/index.html): MEP + AI terms used across the docs.
